economic_notes: Montana First Nation owns four subsidiaries: Colchester Holdings Ltd., 1560750 Alberta Ltd. (Bobtail Construction), Akamihk Kanataskiy Ventures Ltd. (AKV), and Akamihk Energy Incorporated (AEI). AEI operates a Solar Farm. Revenue of $932,744 recorded from AEI for Solar Farm work. $400,000 paid to AKV for subcontract work. COVID-19 noted as a subsequent event with uncertain economic impact.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 (not 2024). Four wholly-owned subsidiaries accounted for by equity method (Colchester Holdings Ltd., 1560750 Alberta Ltd./Bobtail Construction, Akamihk Kanataskiy Ventures Ltd., Akamihk Energy Incorporated). Large increase in TCA due to $11.55M capital acquisitions including infrastructure. Significant deferred contributions balance of $11.1M including Alberta Government climate leadership solar project. Revenue includes deferred contributions recognized/deferred resulting in large net revenue figure. Long-term debt includes mortgages ($697,431), capital lease obligations ($277,204), and ATB bank loan ($371,612). Total long-term debt calculated as sum of all three. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements. Accumulated surplus increased substantially from $22.4M to $33.2M largely due to capital asset additions and enterprise fund growth.
